_meta.purpose: Federal 2026 constants the severance engine needs. Per spec item 4, numbers that already live in the shared tax engine are NOT duplicated here — this file records WHERE each is imported from so the engine reads one source of truth.

supplemental_note: Severance is supplemental wages (IRS Pub 15, 2026). Separate payment: optional flat 22% under $1M/employer/year, mandatory 37% above $1M. If paid combined with a final regular paycheck, the aggregate method applies instead — the engine supports both modes via a toggle. OBBBA (P.L. 119-21) made the underlying TCJA rates permanent, so 22%/37% holds for 2026.
fica_note: FICA applies to severance: 6.2% Social Security up to the 184,500 wage base (prior YTD wages from the SAME employer count toward the base — the engine asks for YTD wages), 1.45% Medicare with no cap, plus 0.9% additional Medicare above the threshold.
